title: Scutes from kills
description: Makes turtles and armadillos drop scutes.
body:
#### Features:
- **Scute Drops**: Armadillos and turtles now drop scutes upon death.
- **Balanced Drop Rates**: The drop probability matches that of shulker shells, maintaining game balance.
- **Looting Compatibility**: Works with looting like that of shulker shells.

#### Installation:
1. Download the datapack.
2. Place it in your world’s datapack folder.
3. Get back into your Minecraft world with new scute drops!

1. Download the mod
2. Place it in mods folder
3. Load fabric, forge or quilt

Check out my other datapacks and subscribe to my [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/dinobrik_gaming) for more exciting Minecraft content and updates!

#### Tags:
Scute Drop, Armadillo Scute, Turtle Scute
